confidence_rationale: Video shows only knot formation demonstration without actual FLS task performance. No Penrose drain, needle driving, or intracorporeal suturing visible. This appears to be an instructional video for knot tying technique rather than a scored FLS task.
cannot_determine: Actual suture placement through drain marks
Whether this represents a complete FLS task 5 performance
technique_summary: Video demonstrates extracorporeal sliding knot formation (Mishra's knot) but does not show complete FLS Task 5 performance including needle driving, suture placement through drain marks, or intracorporeal knot tying.
strengths: Smooth hand coordination during knot construction
improvement_suggestions: Complete demonstration should include needle loading, suture placement through marked drain, and intracorporeal knot tying as per FLS Task 5 requirements
